schema.description: Supply a list of property IDs to filter properties in the response. Note that if a page doesn't have a property, it won't be included in the filtered response.

accessible_by.description: The users or bots who own the bot connection to the `integration_id` and have access to the webhook's `entity`. Only present for public integrations.

id.description: Unique identifier for this webhook event.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the event occurred. Can be used to order events.

workspace_name.description: The name of the workspace where the event originated.

authors.description: The users or bots that performed the action. Typically an array of length 1; can be more for aggregated events.

attempt_number.description: The delivery attempt number (1-8) of the current event delivery.

accessible_by.description: The users or bots who own the bot connection to the `integration_id` and have access to the webhook's `entity`. Only present for public integrations.

ViewFilterRequest.description: "Filter for the view. Uses the same format as the data source query filter (property filters, timestamp filters, or compound and/or filters). Simple property filters appear in the view's filter bar in the Notion UI. Select, status, and multi_select filter operators accept a single string or an array of strings to filter by multiple values (e.g. { \"does_not_equal\": [\"Done\", \"Archive\"] })."

ViewFilterResponse.description: Filter for the view. Can be a property filter (filter by property value), timestamp filter (filter by created_time or last_edited_time), or compound filter (combine filters with and/or logic). Compound filters support up to 2 levels of nesting.

ViewPositionRequest.description: Position of the new view in the database's view tab bar.

visible.description: Whether this property is visible in the view.

width.description: Width of the property column in pixels (table view only).

wrap.description: Whether to wrap content in this property cell/card.

property_name.description: Property name (convenience field, not stable across renames).

visible.description: Whether this property is visible in the view.

width.description: Width of the property column in pixels (table view only).

wrap.description: Whether to wrap content in this property cell/card.

property.description: Property name or ID to sort by.

expires_at.description: When the cached query results expire.

total_count.description: Total number of results in the query.

results.description: The page results for this page.

ViewSortRequest.description: Sort for the view. Can be a property sort (with property and direction) or timestamp sort (with timestamp and direction).

ViewSortResponse.description: Sort for the view. Can sort by property or timestamp.

id.description: Unique identifier for this webhook event.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the event occurred. Can be used to order events.

workspace_name.description: The name of the workspace where the event originated.

authors.description: The users or bots that performed the action. Typically an array of length 1; can be more for aggregated events.

attempt_number.description: The delivery attempt number (1-8) of the current event delivery.

accessible_by.description: The users or bots who own the bot connection to the `integration_id` and have access to the webhook's `entity`. Only present for public integrations.

WidgetPlacementRequest.description: Where to place the new widget in the dashboard. "new_row" creates a new row, "existing_row" adds to an existing row side-by-side with other widgets.

BoardViewConfigRequestSubGroupBy.description: Secondary group-by configuration for sub-grouping within columns. Pass null to remove sub-grouping.

markdown.description: Page content as Notion-flavored Markdown. Mutually exclusive with content/children.

allow_async.description: Set to true to receive an async_task response for markdown page creation. Only supported when markdown is provided.

is_locked.description: Whether the page should be locked from editing in the Notion app UI. If not provided, the locked state will not be updated.

erase_content.description: Whether to erase all existing content from the page. When used with a template, the template content replaces the existing content. When used without a template, simply clears the page content.

allow_async.description: Set to true to opt into receiving an async_task result when this update operation is accepted for background execution. If omitted or false, the endpoint keeps the existing synchronous response shape.

title.description: Title of data source as it appears in Notion.

in_trash.description: Whether the database should be moved to or from the trash. If not provided, the trash status will not be updated.

is_archived.description: Whether to return archived pages. When omitted or false, returns non-archived pages. When true, returns archived pages.

title.description: Title of data source as it appears in Notion.

templates.description: Array of templates available in this data source.

has_more.description: Whether there are more templates available beyond this page.

next_cursor.description: Cursor to use for the next page of results. Null if there are no more results.

title.description: The updated title of the database, if any. If not provided, the title will not be updated.

description.description: The updated description of the database, if any. If not provided, the description will not be updated.

is_inline.description: Whether the database should be displayed inline in the parent page. If not provided, the inline status will not be updated.

in_trash.description: Whether the database should be moved to or from the trash. If not provided, the trash status will not be updated.

is_locked.description: Whether the database should be locked from editing in the Notion app UI. If not provided, the locked state will not be updated.

is_inline.description: Whether the database should be displayed inline in the parent page. Defaults to false.

attachments.description: An array of files to attach to the comment. Maximum of 3 allowed.

filename.description: Name of the file to be created. Required when `mode` is `multi_part`. Otherwise optional, and used to override the filename. Must include an extension, or have one inferred from the `content_type` parameter.

content_type.description: MIME type of the file to be created. Recommended when sending the file in multiple parts. Must match the content type of the file that's sent, and the extension of the `filename` parameter if any.

number_of_parts.description: When `mode` is `multi_part`, the number of parts you are uploading. This must match the number of parts as well as the final `part_number` you send.

external_url.description: When `mode` is `external_url`, provide the HTTPS URL of a publicly accessible file to import into your workspace.

part_number.description: When uploading files greater than 20MB in parts, this is the current part number. Must be an integer between 1 and 1,000.

has_more.description: Whether there are more results available.

next_cursor.description: The cursor to use for the next page of results, or null if there are no more results.

sort.description: Optional sort order for the results. Each entry specifies a property name and direction.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 50.

has_more.description: Whether additional results exist beyond the returned limit.

Values are filter conditions (same shape as a property filter but without the property field). Each quick filter appears as a clickable pill above the view, independent of the advanced filter.

DataSourceObjectResponsePropertiesProper.description: The properties schema of the data source.

InitialDataSourceRequestPropertiesProper.description: Property schema for the initial data source, if you'd like to create one.

PartialDataSourceObjectResponsePropertie.description: The properties schema of the data source.

ViewSortsRequestItem.description: Sort for the view. Can be a property sort (with property and direction) or timestamp sort (with timestamp and direction).

CreateViewRequestQuickFiltersAdditionalP.description: "A property filter condition. Same shape as a property filter but without the \"property\" field (the hashmap key identifies the property). For example: { \"select\": { \"equals\": \"High\" } }."

timezone.description: IANA timezone to use when resolving template variables like @now and @today (e.g. 'America/New_York'). Defaults to the authorizing user's timezone for public integrations, or UTC for internal integrations.

IANA timezone to use when resolving template variables like @now and @today (e.g. 'America/New_York'). Defaults to the authorizing user's timezone for public integrations, or UTC for internal integrations.

MovePageRequestParent.description: The new parent of the page.

UpdateADataSourceRequestProperties.description: The property schema of the data source. The keys are property names or IDs, and the values are property configuration objects. Properties set to null will be removed.

is_default.description: Whether this template is the default template for the data source.

file_upload_id.description: ID of a FileUpload object that has the status `uploaded`.

UploadFileFormDataRequestFile.description: The raw binary file contents to upload.

filters.description: Nested filters; each may be a combinator (and/or) or property filter.

QueryMeetingNotesRequestFilter.description: Optional filter for querying meeting notes. Supports combinator (and/or) and property filters on title, attendees, created_time, created_by, last_edited_time, last_edited_by.

created_time.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this meeting note was created.

last_edited_time.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this meeting note was last edited.

has_children.description: Whether this block has child blocks.

in_trash.description: Whether this meeting note is in the trash.

content.description: The enhanced markdown content to insert into the page.

after.description: Selection of existing content to insert after, using the ellipsis format ("start text...end text"). Omit to append at the end of the page.

UpdatePageMarkdownRequestAllOf1InsertCon.description: Insert new content into the page.

content.description: The new enhanced markdown content to replace the matched range.

content_range.description: Selection of existing content to replace, using the ellipsis format ("start text...end text").

allow_deleting_content.description: Set to true to allow the operation to delete child pages or databases. Defaults to false.

UpdatePageMarkdownRequestAllOf1ReplaceCo.description: Replace a range of content in the page.

content_updates.description: An array of search-and-replace operations, each with old_str (content to find) and new_str (replacement content).

allow_deleting_content.description: Set to true to allow the operation to delete child pages or databases. Defaults to false.

UpdatePageMarkdownRequestAllOf1UpdateCon.description: Update specific content using search-and-replace operations.

new_str.description: The new enhanced markdown content to replace the entire page content.

allow_deleting_content.description: Set to true to allow the operation to delete child pages or databases. Defaults to false.

UpdatePageMarkdownRequestAllOf1ReplaceCo.description: Replace the entire page content with new markdown.

width_ratio.description: Ratio between 0 and 1 of the width of this column relative to all columns in the list. If not provided, uses an equal width.

CreateACommentRequestAllOf1Parent.description: The parent of the comment. This can be a page or a block.

CreateViewRequestQuickFiltersPropertyAdd.description: "A property filter condition. Same shape as a property filter but without the \"property\" field (the hashmap key identifies the property). For example: { \"select\": { \"equals\": \"High\" } }."

name.description: The custom display name to use

QueryMeetingNotesRequestFilterFiltersIte.description: Meeting notes filter node (combinator or property filter).

title.description: Title of the meeting note as rich text.

type.description: Insert the content at the start of the page.

UpdatePageMarkdownRequestAllOf1InsertCon.description: Explicit position for inserted content. Use {"type":"start"} to prepend or {"type":"end"} to append. Cannot be combined with after.

old_str.description: The existing content string to find and replace. Must exactly match the page content.

new_str.description: The new content string to replace old_str with.

replace_all_matches.description: If true, replaces all occurrences of old_str. If false (default), the operation fails if there are multiple matches.

QueryMeetingNotes200ResponseResultsItemM.description: Block IDs for each tab (summary, notes, transcript).

start_time.description: ISO-8601 start time of the calendar event.

end_time.description: ISO-8601 end time of the calendar event.

QueryMeetingNotes200ResponseResultsItemM.description: Calendar event metadata associated with this meeting note.

start_time.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the recording started.

end_time.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the recording ended.

QueryMeetingNotes200ResponseResultsItemM.description: Start and end times of the actual recording.

BaseWebhookPayloadApiVersion.description: The Notion API version that was used to render this webhook event's shape.

BoardViewConfigResponseCardLayout.description: Card layout mode (list shows all properties, compact shows inline).

ChartAggregationRequestAggregator.description: The aggregation operator. "count" counts all rows and does not require a property_id. All other operators require a property_id.

ChartAggregationResponseAggregator.description: The aggregation operator. "count" counts all rows and does not require a property_id. All other operators require a property_id.

ChartReferenceLineRequestDashStyle.description: "Line style: \"solid\" for a continuous line, \"dash\" for a dashed line."

ChartReferenceLineResponseDashStyle.description: "Line style: \"solid\" for a continuous line, \"dash\" for a dashed line."

ChartViewConfigResponseChartType.description: "The chart type: column (vertical bars), bar (horizontal bars), line, donut, or number (single value display)."

ChartViewConfigResponseLegendPosition.description: Legend display position. "off" hides the legend.

ChartViewConfigResponseGroupStyle.description: How grouped/stacked bars are displayed. "normal" stacks values, "percent" normalizes to 100%, "side_by_side" places bars next to each other.

ChartViewConfigResponseDonutLabels.description: What to display on donut chart slices.

DateGroupByConfigRequestStartDayOfWeek.description: Start day of week for week grouping (0 = Sunday, 1 = Monday).

DateGroupByConfigResponseStartDayOfWeek.description: Start day of week for week grouping (0 = Sunday, 1 = Monday).

FormViewConfigResponseSubmissionPermissi.description: Permission level granted to the submitter on the created page after form submission.

FormulaDateSubGroupByRequestStartDayOfWe.description: Start day of week for week grouping (0 = Sunday, 1 = Monday).

FormulaDateSubGroupByResponseStartDayOfW.description: Start day of week for week grouping (0 = Sunday, 1 = Monday).

FormulaTextSubGroupByRequestGroupBy.description: How to group text values. "exact" = exact match, "alphabet_prefix" = first letter.

FormulaTextSubGroupByResponseGroupBy.description: How to group text values. "exact" = exact match, "alphabet_prefix" = first letter.

GalleryViewConfigResponseCardLayout.description: Card layout mode (list shows all properties, compact shows inline).

RequestStatusResponseType.description: Whether the result set is complete or incomplete. `incomplete` means the response does not include all rows that match the query parameters (e.g. due to a server-side pagination depth limit).

StatusGroupByConfigRequestGroupBy.description: How to group status values. "group" groups by status group (To Do/In Progress/Done), "option" groups by individual option.

StatusGroupByConfigResponseGroupBy.description: How to group status values. "group" groups by status group (To Do/In Progress/Done), "option" groups by individual option.

SubtaskConfigRequestDisplayMode.description: How sub-items are displayed. "show" renders hierarchically with toggles, "hidden" shows parents with a count, "flattened" shows sub-items with a parent indicator, "disabled" turns off sub-item rendering.

SubtaskConfigRequestFilterScope.description: Which items are included when filtering. "parents" includes parent items only, "parents_and_subitems" includes both, "subitems" includes sub-items only.

SubtaskConfigResponseDisplayMode.description: How sub-items are displayed. "show" renders hierarchically with toggles, "hidden" shows parents with a count, "flattened" shows sub-items with a parent indicator, "disabled" turns off sub-item rendering.

SubtaskConfigResponseFilterScope.description: Which items are included when filtering. "parents" includes parent items only, "parents_and_subitems" includes both, "subitems" includes sub-items only.

TemplateMentionDateTemplateMentionReques.description: The date of the template mention.

TemplateMentionDateTemplateMentionRespon.description: The date of the template mention.

TextGroupByConfigRequestGroupBy.description: How to group text values. "exact" = exact match, "alphabet_prefix" = first letter.

TextGroupByConfigResponseGroupBy.description: How to group text values. "exact" = exact match, "alphabet_prefix" = first letter.

ViewPropertyConfigRequestStatusShowAs.description: How to display status properties (select dropdown or checkbox).

ViewPropertyConfigRequestCardPropertyWid.description: Property width mode in compact card layouts (board/gallery).

ViewPropertyConfigResponseStatusShowAs.description: How to display status properties (as select dropdown or checkbox).

ViewPropertyConfigResponseCardPropertyWi.description: Property width mode in compact card layouts (board/gallery).

ViewPropertyConfigResponseDateFormat.description: Date display format (date properties only). "full" = localized full date, "short" = month and day, "month_day_year" = MM/DD/YYYY, "day_month_year" = DD/MM/YYYY, "year_month_day" = YYYY/MM/DD, "relative" = relative dates.

ViewPropertyConfigResponseTimeFormat.description: Time display format (date properties only). "12_hour" = 12-hour clock with AM/PM, "24_hour" = 24-hour clock, "hidden" = hide time.

WebhookDatabaseEventEntityType.description: The type of entity. For linked databases, this is `block`.

WebhookUpdatedBlockType.description: The type of the updated block.

FileUploadObjectResponseFileImportResult.description: The type of error that occurred during file import.

DataSourceSchemaUpdatedWebhookPayloadAll.description: The action taken on the property.

DatabaseSchemaUpdatedWebhookPayloadAllOf.description: The action taken on the property.

PostDatabaseQueryRequestResultType.description: Optionally filter the results to only include pages or data sources. Regular, non-wiki databases only support page children. The default behavior is no result type filtering, in other words, returning both pages and data sources for wikis.

CreateFileRequestMode.description: How the file is being sent. Use `multi_part` for files larger than 20MB. Use `external_url` for files that are temporarily hosted publicly elsewhere. Default is `single_part`.

QueryMeetingNotes200ResponseResultsItemM.description: Current processing status of the meeting note transcription.

ListFileUploadsStatusParameter.description: If supplied, the endpoint will return file uploads with the specified status.

notionVersion.name: Notion-Version
notionVersion.description: The [API version](/reference/versioning) to use for this request. The latest version is `2026-03-11`.
